ValidationRule.description: Blocked user to update record status to "In service" if no product is present
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( !$User.BypassValidationRules__c, AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = "Client_delivery_request", OR( ISPICKVAL(Type,"Client Delivery"), ISPICKVAL(Type,"Solvency") ), ISPICKVAL(Status,'In Service'), ISCHANGED(Status), Total_Products__c = 0 ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please insert at least one Product case record
